prompt: Genera recursos digitales para la Unidad 1 de Lengua y Literatura 5to EGB con 3 destrezas (DZ-LENG-5-001, DZ-LENG-5-002, DZ-LENG-5-003). Incluye minijuegos, banco de preguntas y contenido QR.
expected_output: JSON output with minigames, question bank, and QR content. At least 1 minigame, 5+ question bank items per destreza, and 1+ QR content. All resources linked to DZ-refs.
expectations: Output contains valid JSON with minigames, question_bank, and qr_content arrays
Every resource has a dz_ref field matching DZ-LENG-5-XXX pattern
Minigame specs include tipo, mecanica with feedback messages, and difficulty levels
Question bank items include stem, opciones with razon_distractor, and bloom level
QR content includes fallback_offline field for each item
At least 3 different resource types present

prompt: Genera un banco de 10 preguntas para la destreza DZ-MAT-6-005 (resolver operaciones con fracciones) con preguntas de opcion multiple.
expected_output: 10 question bank items in JSON with varied Bloom levels, plausible distractors with documented rationale, and clear DZ-ref alignment.
expectations: Exactly 10 question items in the output
Each item has 4 options with exactly 1 correct answer
Every distractor has a razon_distractor explaining the misconception it represents
Bloom levels vary across items (not all at Recordar level)
Option lengths are similar within each question (no obvious correct answer by length)

prompt: Genera un recurso QR de video para Ciencias Naturales 7mo EGB sobre el ciclo del agua. Contexto: escuela rural sin internet confiable.
expected_output: QR content spec with robust offline fallback. Should emphasize the print alternative given the rural context.
expectations: QR content spec includes video description and DZ-ref
fallback_offline field contains a detailed print alternative, not just 'see appendix'
Response acknowledges offline context and prioritizes accessibility
Fallback is pedagogically equivalent (not just a lesser version)
Duration is appropriate for age group (max 5 min for video)
